languages.text: "Исключено". {n}Эоганн отзывается с непривычным ядовитым холодком в голосе.{/n} "Я не стану произносить тезис, столь откровенно противоречащий реальности".
"Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."
languages.original_text: "Исключено". {n}Эоганн отзывается с непривычным ядовитым холодком в голосе.{/n} "Я не стану произносить тезис, столь откровенно противоречащий реальности".

traits.locale_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn responds with a poisonous chill alien to his voice.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

languages.text: "Kommt nicht in Frage." {n}Eogunn antwortet mit einem für ihn ungewöhnlichen frostigen und beißenden Ton.{/n} "Ich werde keine These erheben, die der Realität derart eklatant widerspricht."
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: "Kommt nicht in Frage." {n}Eogunn antwortet mit einem für ihn ungewöhnlichen frostigen und beißenden Ton.{/n} "Ich werde keine These erheben, die der Realität derart eklatant widerspricht."

languages.text: « Il n'en est pas question, {n}rétorque Eogunn d'un ton venimeux et glaçant qui ne lui est pas familier.{/n} Jamais je n'accepterai d'affirmer une chose aussi mensongère. »
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'en est pas question, {n}rétorque Eogunn d'un ton venimeux et glaçant qui ne lui est pas familier.{/n} Jamais je n'accepterai d'affirmer une chose aussi mensongère. »

languages.text: «Imposible». {n}Eogunn responde con un tono helado y venenoso nada propio de él.{/n} «No pronunciaré una tesis tan evidentemente contraria a la realidad».
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: «Imposible». {n}Eogunn responde con un tono helado y venenoso nada propio de él.{/n} «No pronunciaré una tesis tan evidentemente contraria a la realidad».

languages.text: "Söz konusu bile olamaz." {n}Eogunn, alışılmadık derecede soğuk ve zehirli bir ses tonuyla tersliyor.{/n} "Gerçeklikle bu kadar bariz bir şekilde çelişen bir tezi dile getirmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: "Söz konusu bile olamaz." {n}Eogunn, alışılmadık derecede soğuk ve zehirli bir ses tonuyla tersliyor.{/n} "Gerçeklikle bu kadar bariz bir şekilde çelişen bir tezi dile getirmeyeceğim."

languages.text: “绝无可能。”{n}伊奥贡的语气一反常态地冷淡而尖刻。{/n}“我绝不会说出如此公然违背事实的论断。”
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: “绝无可能。”{n}伊奥贡的语气一反常态地冷淡而尖刻。{/n}“我绝不会说出如此公然违背事实的论断。”

languages.text: 「論外です」{n}エオガンは、彼らしからぬ冷ややかで毒のある口調で言い返す。{/n}「私は、現実にこれほど露骨に矛盾する論題を口にするつもりはありません」
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn snaps back with a frosty and venomous tone unusual to him.{/n} "I will not utter a thesis that so blatantly contradicts reality."

traits.locale_text: 「論外です」{n}エオガンは、彼らしからぬ冷ややかで毒のある口調で言い返す。{/n}「私は、現実にこれほど露骨に矛盾する論題を口にするつもりはありません」
